# stripe_entitlements_active_entitlements (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve the active Stripe Entitlements for a customer.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "stripe_entitlements_active_entitlements" "customer_access" {
  customer = "cus_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `customer` (String) The ID of the customer whose active entitlements to retrieve.

### Optional

- `lookup_key` (String) Filter results to active entitlements for a specific feature lookup key.

### Read-Only

- `active_entitlements` (List of Object) The active entitlements for the customer. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--active_entitlements))
- `id` (String) Internal identifier for this data source result.

<a id="nestedatt--active_entitlements"></a>
### Nested Schema for `active_entitlements`

Read-Only:

- `feature` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `lookup_key` (String)
